title: Roasted Portuguese Pork Roast
description: A delicious and flavorful pork roast recipe, inspired by Portuguese cuisine, with a rich and savory flavor.
instructions: Season the pork roast with salt and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork roast for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 20 minutes.
Reduce oven temperature to 375°F (190°C) and continue roasting for 20-25 minutes per pound, or until the internal temperature reaches 145°F (63°C).
Let the pork roast rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
Meanwhile, mix minced roasted garlic and chopped thyme with a bit of olive oil to make a flavorful sauce.
Serve the sliced pork roast with the garlic-thyme sauce spooned over the top.
